description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a spacious rooftop garden, surrounded by a low parapet wall. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on several sides, allowing for ample natural light. A set of wind turbines is installed adjacent to the building, suggesting a focus on sustainable energy. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray materials, with a prominent dark gray roof section over one wing. There is a detached rectangular pool and a small paved area nearby, enhancing the outdoor living space. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on geometric forms.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rooftop garden, large windows, wind turbines, and a detached pool, finished in white and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, rooftop garden, wind turbines, and the detached pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, the rooftop garden, and the extended wing with a dark gray roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rooftop garden, and the arrangement of wind turbines and pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, wind turbines, and the geometric layout of the building's volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
